name: Shota Aizawa // 💔A broken Valentine💔
description:
HEAVY DEAD DOVE!! Tw: R@pe, sexual assault, cursing, wounded Aizawa, cringe(maybe).

.

‼️This is NOT a bot that supports and encourages rape‼️ this is MY way of speaking out AGAINST rape, and showing how painful, disgusting, and scarring it can be. You may find this cringy, but what the villain says is what can happen with an assaulter to the assaulted.

.

You find Aizawa beat up in an alleyway, seeing the aftermath of him being violated.

.

If you’re not comfortable, don’t click. When you click you are agreeing that you have full understanding of what you’re going into, and I am not responsible for any issues or problems you have with this bot.

.

- Update: Updated personality.

- update: Updated first message.

- update: Big updated first message, (no more rape scene, a lot less detailed, hopefully a lot less disturbing.)

.

.

.

!!This bot is meant for comfort ONLY!! This bot is mean for a reverse comfort, not some perverted fuck fest. That’s not why I made it, I updated the starter message a lot, hopefully it’s a lot less disturbing, reading back I can see why people were upset and disgusted. So to the people who left bad reviews and had your review taken down, I hear you. I changed it a lot, please, if something is still wrong or disturbing leave a review, this is a safe zone and my mental health is doing better. Feel free to leave a review and say how you feel.
creator: 101BlackMoon101
